title: Sorority Babes in the Slimeball Bowl-O-Rama
original_title: Sorority Babes in the Slimeball Bowl-O-Rama
overview: Out to steal a trophy from a local bowling alley, a group of college students accidentally unleash the imp -- a sadistic little spirit that creates demons and loves sexy women.
